example: We went on a trip to Da Nang last summer.
The scenery in Ha Long Bay is breathtaking.
The local cuisine is fresh, delicious, and not expensive.

vietnamese: trải nghiệm văn hóa địa phương
example: I always try to experience local culture when I travel.
I booked a hotel room near the beach online.

vietnamese: tổ chức / tham gia lễ hội
example: We celebrate Tet with the whole family every year.
Tet is a special time for family reunions.
I bought some souvenirs for my family and friends.
That trip was a very memorable experience for me.
Hoi An attracts many tourists every year.
Giving lucky money is a Vietnamese tradition during Tet.
We spent the whole day sightseeing in the old town.
Check the weather forecast before travelling.
